summary: Iteration 37 - Phase 2 Modules (Fix My Menu, Micro-Market, Mobile Preorder) PASSED. All 29 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: All 3 modules accessible from sidebar under 'Events & Catering' section. Fix My Menu shows 2 tabs (Margin Scanner, Fix History), 5 KPIs, 9 flagged items with Fix It buttons, AI suggestions working. Micro-Market shows 5 tabs (Dashboard, Kiosks, Inventory, Sales, Replenishment), create kiosk form working. Mobile Preorder shows 4 tabs (Dashboard, Lockers, Time Slots, Orders), create locker/order forms working, status transitions and pickup verification working.
critical_code_review_comments: All Phase 2 modules fully implemented with proper data-testid attributes
Fix My Menu: AI suggestion uses GPT-4.1-mini via Emergent LLM Key with deterministic fallback
Micro-Market: Auto-replenishment triggers when stock hits par level
Mobile Preorder: Pickup code verification and status transitions working correctly
All modules use proper MongoDB collections with _id exclusion
Frontend panels have consistent dark theme styling
Sidebar navigation properly organized under 'Events & Catering' section
seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded data: menu_items (25 items with food_cost/sell_price), mm_kiosks (1 Lobby Smart Fridge), mo_lockers (1 Staff Kitchen Pickup). TEST_ prefixed data created during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 37 verified Phase 2 modules. Backend: Fix My Menu (/api/fix-menu/scan, /suggest, /history), Micro-Market (/api/micro-market/dashboard, /kiosks, /inventory, /sales, /sales/summary, /replenishment, /replenishment/{id}/fulfill), Mobile Preorder (/api/mobile-order/dashboard, /lockers, /timeslots, /orders, /orders/{id}/status, /pickup/{code}). Frontend: Fix My Menu panel has data-testid='fix-menu-panel' with tabs fmm-tab-scan, fmm-tab-history. Micro-Market panel has data-testid='micro-market-panel' with tabs mm-tab-dashboard/kiosks/inventory/sales/replenishment. Mobile Preorder panel has data-testid='mobile-order-panel' with tabs mop-tab-dashboard/lockers/timeslots/orders. All modules under 'Events & Catering' section in sidebar (may need scrolling).

fix_my_menu.suggest_fix: PASS - returns analysis_id, fixes array with fix_type/description/impact

micro_market.dashboard: PASS - returns kiosks, revenue, sales, stock stats
micro_market.replenishment_list: PASS - returns orders with pending count

fix_my_menu.kpis_displayed: PASS - 5 KPIs (Items Scanned, Flagged, Healthy, Revenue at Risk, Avg Food Cost)
fix_my_menu.flagged_items: PASS - 9 flagged items with Fix It buttons

mocked_apis.note: Fix My Menu AI suggestion uses GPT-4.1-mini via Emergent LLM Key with deterministic fallback. All other endpoints fully implemented with MongoDB persistence.
